description: acme/weather-widget 1.2.0 was previously granted verified status; a fresh, validly-signed revocation feed now carries a revoked_artifacts entry for the synthetic subject verified-attestation:acme/weather-widget at channel verified, version 1.2.0 -- reusing channel-index/1's own revoked_artifacts shape unmodified. The host must stop presenting that version as verified, but must not treat this as ARTIFACT_YANKED against the pack's own release artifact_id: the same version remains installable under the community channel its channel pointer also names.
